howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Learn how to use Tip App on the web. Follow simple steps for tippers and service providers.

download.heading: Get the App
download.subheading: Tip, receive and manage everything on the go.

auth.loginSubtitle: Tip for the service you have received or leave feedback
auth.brandDescription: The simplest way to say thank you. Reward great service instantly, securely, and cashless.
auth.featureFastDesc: Send a tip in seconds, no app required
auth.featureCashlessDesc: Just scan a QR code and you're done
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters long
auth.passwordRequirements: Your password must include at least one of each: uppercase letter, lowercase letter, number, and special character
auth.anErrorOccurred: An error occurred. Please try again.
auth.pleaseEnterEmailForOTP: Please enter your email address to receive an OTP code

validation.invalidPhone: Please enter a valid phone number

common.leaveFeedbackDesc: Help the provider improve their service.
common.positiveFeedbackDesc: Your feedback helps me improve and serve you better.

common.securePrivateDesc: Your reviews and tips are safe with industry-leading security.

onboarding.completeSuccess: Stripe onboarding completed successfully! You can now receive payouts and withdraw funds.
onboarding.continueAsTipperHint: Skip Stripe setup for now and complete your Tipper profile.
onboarding.bannerTitle: Complete Stripe Onboarding to Receive Payouts
onboarding.bannerDescription: To start receiving and withdrawing payments, you need to complete your Stripe onboarding. It only takes a few minutes to set up your payout account.
onboarding.waitingForStripe: Waiting for Stripe to confirm your onboarding…
onboarding.waitingForStripeHint: Complete the setup in the Stripe tab, then return here. This page will update automatically.
onboarding.confirmingReturnHint: Please wait while we verify your payout account setup.
onboarding.incompleteDescription: Something is still missing from your Stripe setup. Please complete the remaining steps to start receiving payments.
onboarding.enableSpDescription: You registered as a Tipper. To receive and withdraw tips, enable your Service Provider account and complete Stripe onboarding.
